question: Is the overall layout divided into three horizontal rows (top title bar, middle main body, bottom indicator area) with approximate height proportions of 12%, 78%, and 10%?
Does the top title bar contain a solid square LOGO on the left and the text 'DASHBOARD' in the center?
Does the right side of the title bar display two lines of small text: 'DATE 01' and 'VER 1'?
Is the middle main body divided into three columns of equal width?
Does the left column contain a table with exactly 5 columns and 8 rows?
Is the first row of the table merged into a single header cell labeled 'H'?
Does the first column of the table contain row labels 'R1' through 'R7'?
Does the table feature alternating light gray backgrounds for odd/even rows?
Does the grouped bar chart (middle column, upper half) contain exactly 4 groups (G1-G4), with each group having 3 bars (A/B/C)?
Does the bar chart Y-axis range from 0 to 100 with exactly 5 divisions?
Does the line chart (middle column, lower half) display exactly 12 data points (M1-M12) marked with circles?
Does the line chart contain exactly 4 light gray horizontal grid lines?
Does the pie chart (right column, upper half) contain exactly 5 sectors (S1-S5)?
In the pie chart, is sector S4 (100°) visually the largest and sector S1 (40°) visually the smallest?
Is there a vertical legend with 5 rows on the right side of the pie chart?
Does the flowchart (right column, lower half) contain the nodes: START, P1, D1 (diamond), P2, P3, P4, and END?
Does the flowchart logic show D1 branching to P2 and P3, which then merge at P4?
Are all connecting lines in the flowchart strictly horizontal or vertical (no diagonal lines)?
Does the bottom indicator area contain exactly 4 equal-width KPI cards?
Do the KPI cards display large numbers '01', '02', '03', '04' on top and small labels 'K1', 'K2', 'K3', 'K4' below?
Are all modules outlined with thin rectangular border frames?
Is the color palette strictly limited to black, gray, and blue tones?
Does the text consist exclusively of Latin letters and numerals?
